title: The Crew Is Scattered by the Current
description: On pages 5–8, this part follows Unknown person #1, Nami, Narrator, Franky, Fish-Men, Luffy, Zoro. The core story beat is the crew is scattered by the current.
scene: The scene centers on the crew is scattered by the current, with Unknown person #1, Nami, Narrator, Franky, Fish-Men, Luffy, Zoro driving the moment.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Whuooo Oooh!!!! Nooooo!! Get off!!! DammItall!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Guaaaa hhhhh!!!! How did this happen?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: How did he fit into that barrel?!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: We ought to have been more careful... If this guy wasn't such an idiot, we could've been in trouble. It looks like he melted his body down like mud to hide himself in there.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: ...that's a devil fruit ability no matter how you look at it... and a logia, to boot.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: He must have been just pretending before, when he took our attacks and let himself get caught.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: I dunno... It just got really hot all of a sudden...!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Look out ahead!! There's something blocking our vision!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Smoke from the ocean floor??! What?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: This is an underwater volcano region!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: And it looks like they've been active recently...!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: If those things erupt, we'll be dead in seconds!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: And who knows what that thing is!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I can't go on in a place like this... Luffy... guys...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: I'm starting to get all depressed... just when I thought I'd found you again...!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Don't be stupid!! Those guys won't die that easy!!

dialogue.speaker: Franky
dialogue.text: We've only been using it in short sports... but still, all that coup de burst usage has got rid of a lot of our air...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: What's that?! It's shining really bright!!

dialogue.speaker: Fish-Men
dialogue.text: Is it fishman Island?! Do you think Luffy and the others are there?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Don't send weird signals from a place like that!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: It's an English!!! It tricked Uuuus!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We've been hunted by a master of the ocean depths!!! How terrible!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Whooo- Oooaaa, that was too close!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: We fell for its trap hook, line and sinker!! Can we get away?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: There's only one sea monster I know that's shaped like a human...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: AaghHH!! It's gonna turn our ship upside down!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: How many times do I GODDA tell you?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: You'll make Cap'n Banda Deck'n Real Mad!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: time to run! Whatever's going on, I say run!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Oh, dead men know no words and know no greed

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: What are the main things that are?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: In a land so black that crows could never fly

summary: The Crew Is Scattered by the Current. This part advances the crew from their post-timeskip reunion into the undersea route and the first conflicts surrounding Fish-Man Island.
